author: Joel Ponukumatla
name: Consensus Stack — int6+zstd, MLP3x, fp16 embed, sliding window eval
blurb: Implements the five-technique consensus stack identified across all top open PRs as of 2026-03-19: int6+zstd quantization, MLP hidden=1536, fp16 tied embedding passthrough, sliding window evaluation (stride=64), and co-optimized LR/schedule (MATRIX_LR=0.02, MUON_MOMENTUM=0.99, WARMDOWN_ITERS=3000).
